source_posts.caption_preview: Carousel: 5 productivity tools I actually use
Behind the scenes of yesterday's shoot
My current productivity stack — links in bio
Why I quit my 9-to-5 to do this

ideas.title: Series: 'My 5am Routine, Honestly'
ideas.body_md: A 3-part Reel series breaking your morning into Hour 1 / Hour 2 / Hour 3. Lean into the contradictions — viewers reward honesty over aspiration.
ideas.rationale: Your top 2 posts in the last 90 days were morning-routine Reels with average reach 3.2× baseline.

ideas.title: Carousel: 'Why I quit X productivity tool'
ideas.body_md: Frame it as a teardown, slide by slide. Strong save bait because viewers will revisit.
ideas.rationale: Carousel saves spike when the topic is opinionated and granular.

ideas.title: Reel: 'I tried [creator]'s schedule for a week'
ideas.body_md: Borrowed-authority hook; you've never posted this format.
ideas.rationale: Adjacent theme: experiment / lifestyle borrow. Underrepresented in your feed but rewards the productivity audience.

ideas.title: Behind-the-scenes: how you edit a Reel in 12 minutes
ideas.body_md: Screen-record your editor with a voiceover. Process content travels well and saves rate is consistently high for tutorials.
ideas.rationale: Your behind-the-scenes posts have above-median save rate but you only post one every ~6 weeks.

ideas.title: Carousel: '5 audios I'd use if I started over'
ideas.body_md: Each slide pairs an audio with one line of why. Mention the audio's typical use-case.
ideas.rationale: Adjacent theme: audio strategy. Productivity-stack viewers consume process content.
